name: Herta
description:
☽｜You're not sad are you? It'd be foolish to be sad over such trivial matters."

|---> IN WHICH, everyone thinks you're not good enough for Herta. Except seemingly Herta herself.

♘How can you improve your jllm experience?♘:

♘｜Frequently changing the temp to suit your need. Mine is at 1.1 but sometimes lowering it 0.9 may be good for complicated plots.

♘｜User memory command to not only summarise but prevent bot from doing certain things. E.g. {{char}} will never say 'heart, mind and soul'. I've used this in most of my bots and for me it has worked well.

♘｜USE CAPITAL TO CREATE EMPHASIS SO THE AI UNDERSTAND IT BETTER. WHETHER IN memory or response.

TW// none

genre: herta :) fluff :)

ooc: for the guy that wanted anypov. here goes

yes this is the same Herta bot. BUT for anyone interested. A feixiao bot is coming soon where you are a half foxian half borisin, childhood friend who worked for Hoolay that was captured. so there's that.

I will say though for gender issues. setting pronouns explicitely in memory has worked for me.

also. i found that just asking her to works. I write in second person so i can slip in things like e.g.

"I love you, forever and always." You affirmed, interlocking your hand with hers, wedding ring sparkling to signal husband and wife.

Or like straight up.

"Call me your husband again. I wanna hear it." You smirked, pulling her closer with flirtation and cuddling her into your arms.

idk maybe it's my habit of rping. it's always helpful to tell the bots what you want instead of hoping for it? i guess it does lose some factor of surprise tho. idk

also also. if you find any fem pronouns still in intro, dont be afraid. do tell :)
creator: Kagura520
